summary: Iteration 45: Testing TemaDom text changes ('3D Video Designer' → '3D Photo Designer') and regional firm limit UI enhancements. Found and fixed one issue: mobile nav still showed '3D Video Designer'. All other features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile nav showed '3D Video Designer' instead of '3D Photo Designer'

passed_tests: ✅ Landing page hero button shows '3D Photo Designer'
✅ Landing page hero subtitle mentions '3 снимки' (not 'видео')
✅ Mobile nav shows '3D Photo Designer' (after fix)
✅ Regional breakdown visible with 28 regions showing 0/2 format
✅ Hero counter shows '(2 на област × 28 області)'
✅ Registration page shows region dropdown for company type (not text input)
✅ Region dropdown shows availability indicators (X/2) with color coding
critical_code_review_comments: Minor fix applied: Changed line 447 in App.js from '3D Video Designer' to '3D Photo Designer' in mobile navigation menu
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified text changes from '3D Video Designer' to '3D Photo Designer' across the app. Fixed one mobile nav issue. Stats API /api/stats/live correctly returns 28 Bulgarian regions with per-region availability data. Registration page for companies shows region dropdown with color-coded availability (green/yellow/red). Key data-testids: hero-room-btn, nav-room-scan, mobile-nav-room-scan, region-breakdown, register-region.

text_3d_photo_designer.details: Hero button, nav dropdown, and mobile nav all show '3D Photo Designer'

pricing_features_snimki.details: Pricing cards mention '3 снимки → 360° дизайн' and similar

regional_breakdown_28_regions.details: Landing page shows regional breakdown with all 28 Bulgarian regions

register_region_dropdown.details: Company registration shows region dropdown (not text input)

region_availability_indicators.details: Region dropdown shows X/2 format with green/yellow/red color coding

hero_counter_text.details: Hero counter shows '(2 на област × 28 области)'
